Cessna 150M - G-BCEG - Full ownership, Oxford

Aircraft Type: Single Engine Fixed Wing
Year: 1976
Make: Cessna
Model: 150M
Reg Number: G-BCEG
Airframe Hours: 7274
Engine Make: Continental O-200-A
Engine Hours: 170 SNEW (Norvic zero-time overhaul 2022)
Prop Make: Sensenich
Prop Hours: 170
ARC: Valid to March 2026
Annual: Completed November 2024

Price: £24,500

Avionics: VHF radio (Becker AR4201), transponder (Mode C), Garmin GPS 96C handheld, VOR/ILS receiver, ADF
No autopilot. Steam gauge instruments throughout.

Airframe fully refurbished 2022. New paint (Murray Flint scheme). New interior. Zero-time engine.
Based at Oxford Airport (EGTK). Tied-down on apron. Full UK CofA. VAT paid.
Full ownership — no sharing arrangements.

Notes: Classic VFR trainer. Excellent condition following 2022 refurbishment. Reliable Continental engine.
Ideal for private use, training, or local touring. No IFR equipment beyond VOR/ILS.
